title: Nintendo hikes Switch 2 prices and expects console sales to decline as memory crunch bites
summary_full: Nintendo said the price of the Switch 2 in the U.S. will rise  from $449.99 to $499.99. In Japan, Nintendo will hike the price from 49,980 yen to 59,980 yen.
summary_public: Nintendo said the price of the Switch 2 in the U.S. will rise  from $449.99 to $499.99. In Japan, Nintendo will hike the price from 49,980 yen to 59,980 yen.
